reviews_5s: I use these jars for my rock collections (small bits fit well) and for my insect wing collection as well. They are great, durable little jars and are like a blank page for endless possibilities. They come at a great price for a good amount, too! I love them and will probably buy more soon now that I've filled them all up!These are the perfect size for spell jars/intention jars. They come with 2 extra corks too in case you lose some. Very cute and I think they are fairly priced.The size is perfect and they are great qualityWe used this to make souvenirs after our beach vacation. They worked perfect. Just the right size and plenty to give out to friends.Nifty little bottles with corks (came with two extra corks). Perfect for crafting. Arrived quickly, great packaging.I've had no problems with these bottles, they're cute. Come as picturedHonestly I was not expecting a lot from these since the price was pretty low for so many but they’re all good quality! The glass is thick enough that I don’t feel like I would break it just by holding them and the corks stay in well. I used them for a Halloween party to make ‘mystery shots’ and they did not disappoint! Will probably end up buying more lolI own a metaphysical shop and bought these jars for a make your own spell jar class. They were a perfect size.Perfect sizeI wanted to keep some of my anointing oil in my car and this is the perfect means to do so!
reviews_1s: Or I got the wrong size.. cute yes and in perfect condition but I bought these for daily meal prep. One for oli and one for vinegar. They only hold a tablespoon each. Was hoping and watching videos etc that they should be at least one ounce. Nope. Pics are misleading or I was shipped bring bottles.Too small to do anything withThe jars are nice but package came with missing jars!
